TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit Messages extends System.Object

Docs.summary:
MESSAGES
The interface is rooted at /messages. Each standard resource operation will produce REST endpoints like GET /messages/{name}, POST /messages, etc. The "name" or "id" parameter is inferred from Azure Core's naming patterns for resource operations.

MemberSignature.Value: protected Messages ();

Protected Sub New ()

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of Messages for mocking.

Docs.summary:
[Protocol Method] Deletes a chat message. Returns 204 on success.
This protocol method allows explicit creation of the request and processing of the response for advanced scenarios.
Docs.returns: The response returned from the service.
Docs.exception: or is null.
or is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.
Service returned a non-success status code.
